REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION IS GRANTED. PARTIES TO PROCEED WITH ALTERNATIVE DISPUTE RESOLUTION IN ACCORDANCE WITH THEIR CONTRACT. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON MEDIATION OR MEDIATION DOES NOT RESULT IN A RESOLUTION WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER, THE PARTIES MUST PROCEED WITH BINDING ARBITRATION. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: W. Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION

is GRANTED. Parties to proceed with alternative dispute resolution in accordance with their contract. If parties cannot agree on mediation or mediation does not result in a resolution within 30 days of this order, the parties must proceed with binding arbitration

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
